name: Paul Zuvella
transactions: June 5, 1979:Drafted by theMilwaukee Brewersin the11th roundof the 1979 amateur draft, but did not sign.
June 3, 1980:Drafted by theAtlanta Bravesin the15th roundof the 1980 amateur draft.
June 30, 1986:Traded by theAtlanta BraveswithClaudell Washingtonto theNew York YankeesforKen GriffeyandAndre Robertson.
January 8, 1988:Signed as a Free Agent with theCleveland Indians.
April 13, 1990:Signed as a Free Agent with theKansas City Royals.
January 21, 1991:Signed as a Free Agent with theKansas City Royals.
